title: Banks to be Conservative Despite Passing 2023 Stress Test
text: All 23 banks have passed the Federal Reserve's 2023 stress test. Yet, the banks, expected to announce capital plans on Friday, will likely be a little conservative this time.

title: Capital One Financial Corporation to Webcast Conference Call on Second Quarter 2023 Earnings
text: MCLEAN, Va. , June 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- On Thursday, July 20, 2023, at approximately 4:05 p.m.

title: Have These Consumer Credit Stocks Run Up Too Far, Too Fast?
text: Capital One Financial, Ally Financial, and One Main Financial stocks gained between 13% to 27% in the past month. These companies benefited from broader strength in the stock market.

title: Small-Caps: 3 Reasons the Worst is Over
text: The historical spread between tech and small caps, a rebounding banking sector, and strong seasonal trends favor out performance in small-cap stocks over the next few weeks.

title: Capital One and Truist raise a combined $6.75 billion in separate corporate bond deals
text: Capital One Financial Corp. COF, -1.33% raised $3.5 billion in a pair of corporate bond offerings while Truist Financial Corp. TFC, -1.05% raised $3.25 billion in two parts, according to filings on Tuesday. Truist issued $1.75 billion in medium-term 5.867% fixed-to-floating rate senior notes due in 2034, as well as $1.5 billion in medium-term 6.047% fixed-to-floating rate senior notes due in 2027.

title: Capital One (COF) Makes a Deal to Acquire Velocity Black
text: Capital One (COF) signs an agreement to acquire Velocity Black to supplement its offerings of customer experiences.

title: Zelle and Chase working to resolve issue with accidental double payments
text: A spokesperson for JPMorgan Chase & Co. JPM, +2.40% on Friday has confirmed statements on social media that some customers that use Zelle are seeing duplicate transactions and fees on their checking accounts. “We're sorry,” the spokesperson said in an email to MarketWatch.

title: Up In 2023 Despite the Bank Panic, Is Now the Time to Invest In Capital One?
text: Capital One is outperforming the S&P 500 financials sector. The company is taking steps to minimize risks ahead of a potential recession.

title: Capital One Acquires Velocity Black to Offer Customers ‘Exceptional Experiences'
text: Capital One has acquired digital concierge company Velocity Black to supplement its offerings of customer experiences. Velocity Black's platform uses both technology and human experts to recommend and fulfill travel, entertainment, shopping and dining offerings to consumers.
